recent_excerpts: SecurityWeek argues autonomous agents — from code generators to decision-making systems — require new defense models as they act without human intervention.
Rapid7's Global Cybersecurity Summit focuses on AI-driven threats, continuous threat exposure management (CTEM), and closing the gap between visibility and response.
Trump administration announces policy to penalize Chinese companies exploiting U.S. AI models via reverse engineering or unauthorized access, citing national security risks.
